title: Customer pipe chart: fix real load path + binding memory
description:
Customer DB3 pipe charts were still broken because the main selection path (syncWincanInspectionState) loaded the chart before folder bindings and fell back to demo data. Stale user-prefs could also wipe freshly loaded Customer links.

PipeShare now waits for inspection bindings on that main path, keeps an in-memory overlay of folder DB3 links so prefs hydrate cannot erase them, and downloads Employee-linked DB3s via presign even when meta/HeadObject fails.

Who is affected: PipeShare Customer (and Employee) WinCan pipe chart on BASE.
changeLog: Fix syncWincanInspectionState to await Customer folder DB3 bindings (was the live path).
In-memory folder DB3 overlay so user-prefs cannot wipe Customer links.
DB3 download: presign-only fallback when /meta HeadObject fails.
No demo observations for remote videos when a link is missing.
